nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Percy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Old French percehaie ‘pierce hedge’ (Old French percer ‘to pierce, penetrate’ + haie ‘hedge, fence’), perhaps with the sense of someone breaking into an enclosure. Percehaie is the name of one of the sons of the foxes Renart and Hermeline in the medieval French epic Roman de Renart, whose earliest known version is from the 1170s. The surname is older than that, but it may originate in a nickname for the fox as ‘enclosure piercer’, perhaps amounting to ‘chicken thief’.

habitational name from any of several places called Percy in Calvados, Eure, and Manche; William de Perci, the Domesday tenant-in-chief and under-tenant of Hugh, Earl of Chester, came from either Percy-en-Auge (Eure) or Percy (Manche).

variants.name: Piercey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

variants.name: Piercy
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: Richard de Percy was born in 1181. He had at least 1 daughter. He died in 1244, in Topcliffe, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard de Percy est né en 1181. Il a eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1244, à Topcliffe, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard de Percy wurde 1181 geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1244 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Topcliffe, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Richard de Percy è nato il nel 1181. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1244, nel Topcliffe, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.Topcliffe, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアトプクリフ
ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Percyは1181年に生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1244年にイギリスヨークシュアイアトプクリフで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Percy(은)는 1181년 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1244년 영국 요르크실르 토pc리프에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard de Percy nasceu em 1181. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1244, em Topcliffe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard de Percy родился в 1181 г. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1244 г. в местности топклифф, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Richard de Percy nació en 1181. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1244, en Topcliffe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años.
